description_long: This is a modern armored combat vehicle with a low-profile, angular hull and a prominent, elongated main cannon mounted on a central turret. The vehicle features a flat, sloped front glacis for deflecting projectiles, and the sides are protected by thick, continuous armor panels. Six large road wheels are visible on each side, indicating a tracked propulsion system, though the tracks themselves are not clearly visible. The rear of the vehicle is squared off with two large exhaust vents, suggesting a powerful engine compartment. The exterior is finished in a matte olive drab color, with no visible camouflage patterns or military insignia. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, suitable for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A low-profile, angular armored combat vehicle with a central turret and long cannon, finished in matte olive drab. It features thick armor panels, six large road wheels per side, and prominent rear exhaust vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis, central turret, and the main cannon pointing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the six large road wheels, angular hull, and the length of the main cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the squared-off back, two large exhaust vents, and the rear armor plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the road wheels, hull shape, and cannon from the opposite side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte olive drab color; no camouflage pattern visible.
